title: lotodes obtusifolium
intro: Lotodes obtusifolium, also known as the lotus-like plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Lotodes obtusifolium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed in the form of teas, capsules, or topical applications.
